dashboard_server.py: added _stream_positions_mark() canonical slice for open-position held-side price/equity/PnL marks
stream emits positions_mark events every 2s for a short-lived connection window
dashboard.html: added EventSource client hookup via ensureStateStream()
added applyStreamPositionsMark(payload) to patch latestOpenPaperPositions and live-equity display
stream updates bot-status-text with stream live / stream stale freshness text
kept initial polling and interval polling intact

push_driven_elements: held-side current price on live position cards
per-position unrealized PnL derived from pushed current price
notes: No credentials or order auth were exposed client-side.
This stage is additive and reversible.
Polling fallback was intentionally left intact.
